name: Buttermilk Chive Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chilled butter (1 stick, cut into small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
3. Stir with a fork to blend and mix well.
4. Add the butter and, using your fingers as a pastry blender, work the butter and flour together until the mixture looks like irregular crumbs.
5. Add the buttermilk and chopped chives. Mix only until the dry ingredients are moistened.
6. Gather the dough into a ball and turn it onto a lightly floured surface.
7. Knead the dough lightly about 12 times.
8. Pat the dough into a circle, keeping it about 1/2 to 3/4 inch thick.
9. Use a 2-inch cookie cutter to cut rounds of dough and place them on a baking sheet.
10. Bake for about 10 minutes, or until the tops are lightly browned.
11. Serve warm.
Yield: 15 biscuits
